channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: France becomes the crypto-kidnapping hotspot—attacks averaging 1 every 2.5 days in 2026. 🔒💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/france-crypto-kidnapping-crisis-41-attacks-2026 #Crypto #France #Security

item.title: Only one of 150 crypto protocols discloses market-maker terms. 91% generate revenue, yet transparency is flatlined. Meteora is the lone public exceptio... https://Blockchain.News/news/crypto-protocols-market-maker-disclosure-study-novora #CryptoTransparency #DeFi #Markets

item.title: 🔥 Seoul tests tokenized government deposits to curb waste and lock spending rules in, not after, the cashout. https://Blockchain.News/news/south-korea-tokenized-deposits-government-spending-pilot-2026 #crypto #blockchain #govtech
